sections.paragraph:
-

(1) fem. adj. רַע evil, bad (see רַע ).

(2) subst.-(a) evil which any one does, Job 20:12 Psa 97:10 or which happens to any one, calamity, Gen 19:19 44:4 . עָשָׂה רָעָה עִם to bring evil upon any one. Gen 26:29 1Ki 2:44, דָּרַשׁ רָעַת פּ׳ under the word דָּרַשׁ.-(b) evil, wickedness. Hos 10:15, רָעַת רָעַתְכֶם “your very wicked wickedness.”
